parameters.name: tr
parameters.override_behavior: sets out and metric transition smoothing

parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets clk and rst logic threshold

parameters.name: target
parameters.override_behavior: sets zero-error decision point and reset trial value

parameters.name: step_init
parameters.override_behavior: sets the first signed trial adjustment and reset step size

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic clocked voltage-domain calibration state.
Do not use current contributions, transistor-level devices, AC/noise behavior, or KCL/KVL solving assumptions.
Do not add validation logic, hidden state observables, or simulator-specific side channels.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: Active reset restores out to target, the current step to step_init, the cycle count to zero, and metric low.
On each active rising clk update before completion, vin above target increases out by the current step and vin below target decreases it.
The current step halves after every active decision update, yielding the public successive-approximation sequence from step_init.
Metric asserts after four active search updates and subsequent rising clocks hold the completed trial state until reset.
Out remains within vmin through vmax for every trial update.

title: Successive Approximation Calibration Search FSM
